posts.author: MarcoLupi (@)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everybody, I read this article on the blog:

monday.com Blog – 26 Mar 21

Everything you need to know about task dependencies

Learn what task dependencies are and how to effectively manage them to keep your project on track. Plus one tool you can use to optimize your projects!

Est. reading time: 7 minutes

In particular, I am interested in this part where it talks about the different kinds of dependencies:

• Finish to Start (FS)
• Start to Start (SS):
• Finish to Finish (FF):
• Start to Finish (SF):

My question is, how can I implement them on Monday? Because as far as I know there is only one type of it FS.

Thanks,
Marco

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Marco,

Our partner WorkPerfect (contact @Kimb) just released an app called SchedulerPro. This app supports all 4 dependency types, lag, skipping weekend days and loop detection. If you are familiar with Wrike you will love this app. The timelines in the screenshot below are created from the dates with this app https://monday.com/marketplace/18

image1746×295 31 KB

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks @basdebruin.

Hi @MarcoLupi,
Please see my post here for more information
